sourceMovie.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto If I Had Legs I'd Kick You (2025) as a drama theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Shutter Island
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If If I Had Legs I'd Kick You clicked for you, Shutter Island (2010) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after If I Had Legs I'd Kick You?
faq.answer: Try Shutter Island, Awakenings, CODA—each shares DNA with If I Had Legs I'd Kick You while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is If I Had Legs I'd Kick You?
faq.answer: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You (2025) is best described as Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is If I Had Legs I'd Kick You worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
